name: ASUS TUF GAMING B650-E WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 2x PCIe 4.0 x16 - Support DDR5-8000+(OC) - 3x M.2 Slots - USB 10Gbp Type-C+A - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Realtek 2.5GbE LAN - 802.11ax Wi-Fi 6E - Bluetooth 5.3
shortName: ASUS TUF GAMING B650-E WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 2x PCIe
description: Gaming-focused ATX motherboard for AM5 socket with DDR5 and dual PCIe 4.0 slots, featuring Wi-Fi 6E.
